description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a complex, multi-sectioned gable roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, complemented by white trim around the windows and doors. The front facade features a covered porch with columns, a main entry door, and several symmetrically arranged windows. On one side, there is an attached carport with a slatted roof, sheltering a white vehicle, and a driveway extending to the street. The rear and side elevations show additional windows and a small patio area with outdoor furniture. The house sits on a rectangular lot with paved walkways and a driveway, giving it a welcoming and functional appearance suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A single-story beige house with a gray gable roof, covered porch, attached carport, and symmetrically arranged windows, set on a paved lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, columns, and the carport with a vehicle on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, driveway, and the transition from the front porch to the side of the house.
description_view_2: Rear and side view displaying additional windows, the patio area, and the full length of the house's roofline.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the carport, more windows, and the paved walkway leading to the rear.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, single main door, steps, and decorative trim
